title: Use cases
html:
May 2025 catering / event micro by Yahir: a hangout opener line ("You go out with your boy"), then a Mexican-food menu (carne asada, carnitas, pollo adobado, rice, beans, red salsa, green salsa) with "812.5 / 65 - people" pricing math. Likely a quoted catering plan from the Austin era.

yahir gonzalez · austin tx · bridge income strategies
